items.title: 9.7.0 RC1
items.summary: The Gradle team is excited to announce Gradle 9.7.0 RC1. Here are the highlights of this release: Isolated Projects graduates to incubating Broader Configuration Cache compatibility More source locations in problem reports Read the Release Notes We would like to thank the following community members for their contributions to this release of Gradle: Adam ,…

items.summary: Add feature preview for enhanced graph orderings ( #38077 )
